nodes.label: AI as conversational search engine to counter bias
nodes.label_negative: Reliance on prior experience leading to bias
nodes.grounding_span: I can ask for sources from interesting ideas and gather insights that I may have overlooked due to prior experience with projects providing a source of bias

nodes.label: AI as brainstorming and idea generator
nodes.grounding_span: I use AI for experimental idea generation

nodes.label: AI as collaborative partner
nodes.grounding_span: Most likely back-and-forth. Especially for idea generation

nodes.label: AI reliability and accuracy in generated content
nodes.grounding_span: AI hasn't proven to be successful in doing this for me yet

nodes.label: AI for novel parameter discovery
nodes.grounding_span: I used AI to help me figure out a novel parameter that I could use to elicit a specific response

nodes.label: AI as data manipulation tool
nodes.grounding_span: AI helping with in-lab automation, document generation (basic), and data management

nodes.label: Scientific discovery and breakthrough
nodes.grounding_span: The result was a record-setting output for my specific project

nodes.label: Efficiency and time savings
nodes.grounding_span: AI could make our lives easier and more efficient

nodes.label: Learning and intellectual growth
nodes.grounding_span: I always try to see the future and stay ahead

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for novel parameter discovery
nodes.grounding_span: The result was a record-setting output for my specific project that was actually featured in my promotion paperwork

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for document analysis
nodes.grounding_span: I worked for 6 hours straight one day working on a prompt to get the AI to output only one section of a document. I never got the AI to output my desired format or data visualizations

nodes.label: Excitement about AI's potential for automation
nodes.grounding_span: I believe AI will have the ability to streamline our work in a way that gives us time to use our brains for the theoretical knowledge

nodes.label: Proactive learning and skill maintenance
nodes.grounding_span: I always try to see the future (so to speak) and stay ahead

nodes.label: Structured iterative validation — uses AI to systematically check and refine work
nodes.grounding_span: I can follow this up with a conversation with the AI about that specific parameter to gather further insights and collect sources
